methods.name: update_email_contract
methods.desc: Update this Email Contract if creator

methods.name: set_globals
methods.desc: Set Globals for this users email

methods.name: send_email_by_email
methods.desc: Send an email and use another email directly for the "to" field

methods.name: transfer_email_ownership
methods.desc: Transfer email ownership via internal method in registry

methods.name: claim_ownership
methods.desc: Claim Ownership of this email account if owner and set the deterministic & curve accounts

methods.name: send_email_by_account
methods.desc: Send email and use the receiver address as the "to" field

methods.name: receive_email
methods.desc: Receive an email from some other user
